---
title: "ENVS193ds-final"
author: "Valeria Fierros"
date: "due: 2026-03-17"
format: html
editor: visual
---

[Link to final GitHub Repo](https://github.com/valeriafierros/ENVS-193DS_winter-2026_final.git)

```{r}
#| label: set up
#| message: false
#| warning: false



```

# Problem 1: Research writing
